messages.content:
Provide a concise explanation of how this vulnerability could be exploited.

Cross Site Scripting vulnerability found in NetScoutnGeniusOne v.6.3.4 allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via the creator parameter of the Alert Configuration page.
An attacker can craft a malicious input for the creator parameter on the Alert Configuration page, allowing the execution of unauthorized scripts in the user's web browser session.
